title: Google Just Dropped The Singularity Bomb
summary: Google DeepMind's Demis Hassabis suggests humanity may be entering the "foothills of the singularity" as AI agents demonstrate utility in coding, research, planning, and scientific discovery. The video argues that the critical question has shifted from AI perfection to whether imperfect but useful AI systems can accelerate real-world work.
